license_requirement.license_gate_message: Richiede Microsoft Sway incluso nel piano M365.

checks.portal: Microsoft 365 Admin Center > Impostazioni > Org Settings > Sway
checks.expected_result: 'Let people in your organization share their sways with people outside your organization' = Off
checks.description: Verificare che la condivisione esterna di Sway sia disabilitata

title: Ensure that Sways cannot be shared with people outside of your organization

remediation.description: Microsoft 365 Admin Center > Impostazioni > Org Settings > Sway: disabilitare la condivisione esterna.

complexity_notes: Un solo check: impostazione nella sezione Microsoft Sway dell'M365 Admin Center.
